item.gregic_tinkering.wrench.description:
The Wrench is a tool used to manipulate and dismantle machines and pipes.
It is also used in crafting to assemble components.
item.gregic_tinkering.hammer.description:
The Hard Hammer is a used in crafting to shape metals, silence machines, and prospect for ores or caves.
It can also harvest blocks, breaking them down in the process.
item.gregic_tinkering.file.description: The File is a tool used in crafting to shape an item by removing material.
item.gregic_tinkering.screwdriver.descri:
The Screwdriver is a used to configure a machines outputs.
It is also used in crafting to fasten screws.
item.gregic_tinkering.saw.description:
The Saw is a used to cut wood and harvest ice.
It is also used in crafting to cut apart items.
item.gregic_tinkering.wire_cutter.descri:
The Wire Cutter is a used to manipulate and break wires.
It is also used in crafting to make fine cuts in metal.
item.gregic_tinkering.crowbar.descriptio:
The Crowbar is a used to pry covers off of machines and pipes.
It is also used to kill headcrabs.
item.gregic_tinkering.soft_mallet.descri:
The Soft Mallet is a used to toggle a machines active state.
It is also used in crafting where a hammer would be too damaging.
item.gregic_tinkering.plunger.descriptio:
The Soft Mallet is a used to erase unwanted fluids from tanks.
It is also used to EXTERMINATE.
item.gregic_tinkering.drill.description:
The Drill is a powered mining tool. It is effective on both dirt and rock, and harvests blocks in a large range.
It requires energy to function.
item.gregic_tinkering.chainsaw.descripti:
The Chainsaw is a powered wood-cutting tool, capable of quickly felling even the largest of trees.
It requires energy to function.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.efficiency.de: How efficiently the engine converts fuel into power.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.power_reinfor: Percentage of damage reduced by consuming energy.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.power_draw.de: How much energy is consumed to perform an action.
This tool consumes EU from a battery to operate.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.fuel_type.ste: This tool consumes steam from a fluid tank to operate.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.fuel_type.die: This tool consumes any liquid fuel from a fluid tank to operate.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.fuel_type.gas: This tool consumes any gas fuel from a fluid tank to operate.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.capacity.desc: The capacity of the tool's battery battery.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.fluid_capacit: The capacity of the tool's fluid tank.
tool_stat.gregic_tinkering.power_tier.de: Determines the energy voltage needed to charge this tool.
modifier.gregic_tinkering.electric_item_: Shows the current and maximum charge of the battery.
modifier.gregic_tinkering.powered.descri: This tool needs to consume power in order to function.
modifier.gregic_tinkering.air_fed.descri: This tool needs air to function.
modifier.gregic_tinkering.transformer.de: Allows this tool to accept unlimited power.
modifier.gregic_tinkering.lubricated.des: Reduces the energy cost of using the tool.
